what: Helps Download Archives of GitHub Repositories
title: Helps Download Archives of GitHub Repositories
text: goal gitcellar help download archives repositories organization. context see blog post Safeguards Backups GitHub Organizations.

title: Helps Download Archives of GitHub Repositories
text: can install development version gitcellar GitHub : need GitHub Personal Access Token. See gh docs topic.

title: Helps Download Archives of GitHub Repositories
text: basic example shows download archives repositories organization (owner): archives (<org-name>_<repo-name>_migration_archive.tar.gz) saved distinct folders (archive-<org-name>_<repo-name>) current directory (directory input via argument dest_folder). might seem wasteful create one archive per repository opposed one archive repositories experience prevents failures. , reason store one archive per folder due fact worked better tool used uploading archive cloud service. step, can use tool choice upload backups cloud service like Digital Ocean, AWS, etc. run code week keep 8 weeks backups rolling basis.

text: Download archives GitHub repositories within organization

title: Download archives of GitHub repositories within an organization — download_organization_repos
code: download_organization_repos(   organizations = NULL,   extra_repos = NULL,   dest_folder = getwd() )

title: Download archives of GitHub repositories within an organization — download_organization_repos
text: organizations Organization name(s) (vector) extra_repos Named vector extra repository names names organization names. dest_folder save folders archives.

title: Download archives of GitHub repositories within an organization — download_organization_repos
text: need GitHub Personal Access Token. reason might need extra_repos want download archives private repositories, using GitHub Personal Access Token scope. GitHub documentation archives.
